message:
feat: Add codegen helpers for Two-Flow Type System

Add helper methods to NativeCodegen for checking type confidence:
- isVarUncertain(): check if variable needs PyValue
- isVarCertain(): check if variable can use raw Zig types
- getTypedVar(): get TypedValue with type + confidence
- shouldUsePyValue(): main entry point for codegen decisions

These enable incremental integration of uncertain type handling.
